components.name: magnesium sulfate (MgSO4)

components.name: calcium chloride (CaCl2)
components.evidence: supplemented with 2 mM MgSO4, 0.1 mM CaCl2

components.name: L-arabinose
components.evidence: strain VA11 was capable of utilizing 10 g/L arabinose as the sole carbon source for growth

media.base_medium: M9 minimal salts (standard 1×), no trace-element or vitamin supplement stated

sources_chased.what: paper Methods/Results (PMC12552152 full text + EuropePMC XML)

media.notes: Paper defines a plain 1× M9 (Na2HPO4/KH2PO4/NaCl/NH4Cl + 2 mM MgSO4 + 0.1 mM CaCl2) with 10 g/L L-arabinose as sole carbon source; grown aerobically at 30 C, 220 rpm. No base-medium reference, no trace-element solution, and no vitamins are cited anywhere. The trace-metal exchanges in current_components (Co2+, Cu2+, Fe2+/Fe3+, Mn2+, Zn2+) are model auto-additions and are NOT part of the paper's stated recipe.

components.name: D-xylose
components.evidence: Shake-flask profiles of strains VA05 and VA06 in M9 medium with 20 g/L xylose; the strain VA06 was capable of utilizing xylose as the sole carbon source for growth

media.base_medium: M9 minimal salts (standard 1× base; shake-flask experiments use 2× M9 in some panels), no trace-element or vitamin supplement stated
media.notes: Same plain 1× M9 base (Na2HPO4/KH2PO4/NaCl/NH4Cl + 2 mM MgSO4 + 0.1 mM CaCl2) with 20 g/L D-xylose as sole carbon source; aerobic, 30 C, 220 rpm. No base-medium reference, trace-element solution, or vitamins are cited. Trace-metal exchanges in current_components (Co2+, Cu2+, Fe2+/Fe3+, Mn2+, Zn2+) are model auto-additions, not part of the paper's stated recipe.
